title: Style attributes
description: Style attributes control visual appearance: background, borders, shadows, corners, and style presets.

data.name: background
data.description: Background color - hex string (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) or color name from colors.json (can be data binding)
data.summary: Background color. Accepts hex `#RGB`/`#RRGGBB`/`#RRGGBBAA`, named colors, or `@color/token`. For gradients use the `gradient` attribute or GradientView.

data.name: borderColor
data.description: Border color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)
data.summary: Border color. Requires `borderWidth` for the border to render.

data.name: borderStyle
data.description: Border line style - solid (default), dashed, or dotted
data.summary: `solid` / `dashed` / `dotted`. Web supports all; iOS/Android default is `solid`.

data.name: clipToBounds
data.description: Whether to clip content to bounds (binding supported)
data.summary: Boolean. When `true`, children that overflow the View are clipped.

data.name: cornerRadius
data.summary: Rounded corners in pt/dp/px. Accepts a number (uniform) or array `[tl, tr, br, bl]` for per-corner control.

data.name: defaultBackground
data.description: Default background color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)
data.summary: Background color in the default (non-interactive) state. Base layer for the pressed / disabled overlays.

data.name: disabledBackground
data.description: Background when disabled - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

data.name: effectStyle
data.summary: Visual effect preset. Used by Blur; platform-specific blur / material style value.

data.name: highlightBackground
data.description: Background color when highlighted - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)
data.summary: Background color shown when the component is highlighted (e.g., pressed).

data.name: shadow
data.summary: Drop shadow object: `{ color, offsetX, offsetY, radius, opacity }`. Applied to the entire View bounds.

platformDiff.swift_uikit: layer.shadowColor / shadowOffset / shadowRadius / shadowOpacity に分解してマップ。
platformDiff.kotlin_compose: Modifier.shadow(elevation, shape)。offsetX/Y は限定サポート。
platformDiff.react: CSS `box-shadow: Xpx Ypx radiuspx color` に変換。

data.name: style
data.summary: Preset style name. Defined in `docs/screens/styles/*.json`. Accepts a single name or array of names; later entries override earlier.

data.name: tapBackground
data.description: Background color when tapped - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)
data.summary: Button-specific. Background color shown during tap-down. Reverts to `background` on release.

data.name: tintColor
data.description: Tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)
data.summary: Color applied to tinted content (monochrome icons, progress tracks, switches). Specific component implementations decide what gets tinted.
